name: @metorial/postgrid-verify
description: Verify, standardize, and geocode postal addresses for US, Canada, and 245+ international countries. Validate single or batch addresses (up to 2,000), autocomplete partial addresses with type-ahead suggestions, perform geocoding and reverse geocoding, and detect change-of-address records via NCOA. Addresses can be submitted as structured components or freeform strings, with options for detailed parsing, residential/vacant detection, ZIP+4 lookup, and transliteration of foreign-language addresses.
